results.title: MyFxbook Trading Journal Alternative: Plancana — Psychology-First Journal & AI Coach
results.content:
It depends on the job. For a public, verified track record, copy trading (AutoTrade), and community discovery, MyFxbook is purpose-built. For private journaling, emotional discipline, and AI coaching that helps you stop repeating the same mistakes, Plancana wins. Most disciplined forex traders end up using MyFxbook to prove results and Plancana to produce them.

## Turn your MyFxbook stats into better trades

MyFxbook proves your results. Plancana helps you improve them. Download free and start journaling with AI today.

App Store

Google Play

No credit card required · Free to download [...] "If your main goal is a public, verified track record or copy trading, MyFxbook is the right tool — and it costs nothing."

## Why Plancana Is the Best MyFxbook Alternative for Journaling

Most traders don't blow accounts because they lack stats — MyFxbook already gives them plenty. They blow accounts because of behavior. Plancana fixes the trader, not just the scoreboard.

### A Journal Built for Mobile, Not a Stats Page

MyFxbook lives on a web dashboard with a companion app that mostly views stats. Plancana is built mobile-first — journal your reasoning and emotions the second you close a trade, while the feeling is still raw and the memory is accurate.

### AI Mentor vs. Static Analytics [...] ## You Don't Have to Leave MyFxbook Behind

Switching journals usually means exporting CSVs and re-importing months of history. Not here. Because Plancana auto-syncs the same MT4 and MT5 account MyFxbook reads from, you can run both side by side from day one — MyFxbook for your verified public record, Plancana for private journaling and AI coaching.

1

### Connect your broker

Link MT4, MT5, ByBit, or TradeLocker with read-only access — no CSV, no API keys to juggle.

2

### Trades sync in

Your full history pulls automatically — the same trades MyFxbook tracks, now ready to journal.

3

### Get coached

Tag your mindset, add notes, and let the AI Mentor find the patterns costing you money.

results.title: TradesViz vs AI Trading Journal Apps. What "AI" Actually Means in a Trade Journal
results.content:
After only a short time of using TradesViz, I can confirm that this platform is exactly what I have been looking for.  It takes the chore out of journaling – the number of stats, data, and information available on my trades is a complete game-changer.  The importing process via MT4 file is extremely easy and the automated charts with entries are amazing.  The whole process is extremely easy and helps to keep me accountable for my trading by having a professional system to manage my business.  The platform is very comprehensive and takes a bit of time to get used to, but they have many videos on their YouTube to help with this as well as their support team. [...] profile picture

[...] ### Dedicated Note Taking + AI

Write notes, tag your notes, search your notes and even ask the AI to generate trade summaries as notes for your trades. TradesViz has a dedicated note tab for all notes management.

### Advanced Statistics

MFE/MAE, R/R ratios, Best/EOD Exit, Multi-Timeframe exit, Market-TA-Comparison, Running PnL analytics, Options greeks analysis and more - all of these on top of existing PnL charts make ~600+ charts on TradesViz.

## Not just another journal. We pushed the boundaries of journaling.

With a team of data scientists, researchers and veteran traders TradesViz is built with a singular focus of improving trading performance in a data-driven way.
